title: codereview pass 2: inconsistent DEFAULT_SF dependency between link and routing
description: In link/Kconfig DEFAULT_SF depends on !LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED. In routing/Kconfig it depends on LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED. With top-level definition, this needs cleanup. The default SF should be available regardless. P2 finding. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed by consolidating Kconfig definitions into lichen/subsys/lichen/Kconfig, removing duplicates from link/ and routing/, adding depends on LICHEN, and updating help text for consistency with spec and zrh2.2. Duplicates eliminated, dependencies corrected.
